name: run-mate-script-runner
description: Quick script runner with intelligent status bar buttons for package.json scripts. Auto-detects npm, pnpm, yarn, and bun with multi-root workspace support.

run-mate-script-runner.useDynamicScriptP.description: Enable dynamic status bar buttons generated from package.json scripts.

run-mate-script-runner.workspaceMode.description: How to handle multi-root workspaces when building buttons: first folder, pick per run, or all folders.

run-mate-script-runner.excludeScripts.description: List of scripts to ignore when generating status bar buttons.

run-mate-script-runner.maxDynamicScriptB.description: Maximum number of script buttons shown before collapsing into an overflow menu.

run-mate-script-runner.scriptOrder.description: Priority order for scripts. Scripts listed here will appear first.

run-mate-script-runner.reuseTerminalForS.description: Reuse dedicated terminals per script instead of creating a new terminal each time.

run-mate-script-runner.askBeforeKill.description: Ask for confirmation before stopping a running script when re-running from the status bar.

run-mate-script-runner.alwaysInstallDepe.description: Always run install command (npm install, pnpm install, etc.) before running a script.

run-mate-script-runner.autoInstallMissin.description: Automatically run install command if node_modules folder is missing.

run-mate-script-runner.pickerOnly.description: Show only a single '$(list-unordered) Scripts' button in the status bar. Clicking it opens the script picker where favorites appear first. No individual script buttons are shown.

run-mate-script-runner.statusBarSide.description: Which side of the status bar to place script buttons. Right side is usually less crowded.
